s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: Element Z (Cancer-Destroying Powder) + The Perfect Drink: Element Z is an all-natural spice first used in ancient Rome. It was highly valued for its medicinal merits. People who used it were more vital, sharper and less prone to disease. When the Roman Empire fell, it disappeared. Today, the average diet contains hardly a pinch of this miraculous compound... except in one place. One tiny region of the planet eats more of this spice than any other place on earth, by far. And this region has significantly lower cancer rates compared with what we're dealing with here in the 'modern' world. According to research presented at the American Association for Cancer Research, when Element Z was applied to ovarian cancer cells, every single cancer cell died as a result of being exposed to the compound. Sources at a major international cancer institute confirm that this powder is 10,000 times more effective than traditional techniques at destroying cancer cells.

unique_differentiators: Only natural compound proven to make cancer cells literally commit suicide (apoptosis) while leaving healthy cells untouched - 10,000 times more effective than chemo/radiation and costs just $3.97

lead.full_text: Dear Concerned American, I recently got my hands on a small bag filled with an odd powder. It's inexpensive, weighs just a couple of ounces... and I believe it could prevent cancer. I'll tell you exactly what this powder is and how to get your hands on it today... but first I need to prove its incredible power. Few folks (including many of the doctors I've spoken to) are aware of this breakthrough - yet the evidence is clear. You see, a secretive group of researchers from the University of Michigan recently took powder just like this, dissolved it in water and poured it onto cancer cells. What happened next was stunning... The cancer cells dissolved. They literally killed themselves.
lead.hook_sentence: I recently got my hands on a small bag filled with an odd powder.
lead.transition_to_body: It is perhaps the biggest cancer breakthrough of our lifetimes...
lead.emotional_progression: curiosity → credibility → shock (cancer dissolved) → hope → urgency

Today, the average diet contains hardly a pinch of this miraculous compound... except in one place. One tiny region of the planet eats more of this spice than any other place on earth, by far. specimens.quote: A secretive group of researchers from the University of Michigan recently took powder just like this, dissolved it in water and poured it onto cancer cells. What happened next was stunning... The cancer cells dissolved. They literally killed themselves.

Sources at a major international cancer institute confirm that this powder is 10,000 times more effective than traditional techniques at destroying cancer cells. According to results presented at the American Association for Cancer Research, when Element Z was applied to ovarian cancer cells, every single cancer cell died as a result of being exposed to the compound.

Sheila Rollins is living proof. At age 50, she was diagnosed with Stage 3-4 brain cancer. She was told that she'd be dead in six months. But her gut told her the poison her doctors were pumping into her was doing more harm than good. She knew she'd die if she stayed in that hospital. So she walked out. She started swallowing a vitamin that contained just 10 milligrams of this powder every day. It's been eight years since she was told she'd be dead in six months. Today, she's 58, a grandmother of three, and says, 'I feel wonderful.'

Enoch Davies. In 2008, he noticed suspicious lesions - one between his eyes, another on his cheek and yet another weird one on his arm. It was cancer... basal cell carcinoma. If he didn't follow the doctor's orders, he was told, he'd be blind in six months and dead in a year. He walked out and prayed. He found out about Element Z and began taking a tiny bit each day with capsaicin and turmeric. Within weeks, Enoch's wounds stopped bleeding. Then they started healing. Now, he's entirely cancer-free.

One tiny region of the planet eats more of this spice than any other place on earth, by far. And this region has significantly lower cancer rates: Americans get 23 times more prostate cancer, 9 to 14 times the rate of melanoma, as much as 11 times more colorectal cancer, 9 times more endometrial cancer, 17 times more lung cancer, 8 times more bladder cancer, 5 times more breast cancer, and as much as 12 times more kidney cancer than they do.
According to best-selling author Dr. Michael Greger: 'Studies in this country have great potential for improving our understanding of the relationship between diet and cancer.'

Veroniqu Desaulniers, best-selling author and expert in natural cancer cures: 'Sadly, the 'big three' traditional cancer protocols - surgery, chemotherapy and radiation - are big business. It all boils down to one thing: Money and patent-based revenue dollars for pharmaceutical companies that sponsor most cancer research.'

Given the choice, most folks would ditch Big Pharma in a heartbeat... taking billions of dollars with them. Would you rather utilize a drug such as Taxol, which produces side effects like blurred vision, ulcers, fatigue, back pain, painful urination, diarrhea, hair loss, brain fog, inflammation, impaired breathing and a compromised immune system - or a proven cancer-healing protocol that has absolutely no side effects whatsoever?

Alan Partridge, powerful Olympian and England's top marathoner. After medical emergency and amputations, his wounds refused to heal for nine months. New Zealand's University of Waikato doctors discovered Canaan's Cure (honey). After nine months with no healing, within nine weeks he had completely healed. Just like that.

Don Wilders had a heart attack at age 46. He recently passed away at the ripe old age of 96. Until the day he died, he swore his late-in-life health came from one thing: his daily routine of drinking two tablespoons of Pearl's Milk (apple cider vinegar).

fssit_candidates.statement: Our medical companies, doctors and government health specialists actually DO NOT WANT to cure cancer. I know, it's shocking to think. But these people's careers and livelihoods depend entirely on sick people. That's where all the money comes from.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains why cancer rates keep rising despite medical 'advances', why natural cures are dismissed, why treatments are so expensive and don't actually cure - the entire medical establishment profits from chronic illness not cures

fssit_candidates.statement: The old notion that cancer 'runs in families' is bunk... it's an outdated and antiquated theory. According to the National Cancer Institute, genetics are responsible for only 5% to 10% of cancer cases. The other 95%? They're caused by our environment and the food we put in our bodies.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Removes fatalistic belief that cancer is genetic lottery - 95% is preventable through environment and diet, which means you have control and past failures weren't your fault

fssit_candidates.statement: Even The Washington Post wrote that some of these natural fixes 'do work.' But I don't blame you for being skeptical. Which is why I'm going to outline, with scientific proof, that these ingredients work.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Validates skepticism about natural health claims while providing proof that specific natural solutions actually work - you were right to question most claims, but these are different

fssit_candidates.statement: A court in California recently awarded a man a whopping $289 million because the jury found that Roundup likely caused his deadly cancer. But here's the thing CNN and NBC aren't telling you... the FDA found the killer poison in nearly everything we eat.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains rising cancer rates and health problems - the industrialized food system is contaminating nearly everything with weed killer while FDA stays silent
